task_completion.description: The agent opened the filter or layer properties dialog for the correct layer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Filter' or 'Layer Properties' dialog window is open, clearly indicating it is for the 'ne_110m_admin_0_countries' layer.

task_completion.description: The correct filter expression is constructed to isolate South America.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The expression text area in the filter dialog contains a condition setting the 'CONTINENT' field equal to 'South America' (e.g., "CONTINENT" = 'South America').

task_completion.description: The map canvas updates to show only South American countries.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main map view displays only the polygons representing the South American continent. The rest of the world's landmasses are no longer visible.

task_completion.description: The layer was filtered in place without creating a new shapefile.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Table of Contents (layer list) on the left side of the gvSIG interface shows only the original 'ne_110m_admin_0_countries' layer. No new layers have been added to the view.

task_completion.description: The project is saved to the specified target path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save'/'Save As' dialog shows the file being saved as 'sa_regional.gvsproj' in the '/home/ga/gvsig_data/projects/' directory, or the main gvSIG window title bar updates to show 'sa_regional'.

integrity.description: The agent used the gvSIG Desktop GUI to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with gvSIG menus, dialogs, and map canvas, rather than terminal commands modifying the .gvsproj XML file directly.

integrity.description: The map view shows genuine GIS rendering within the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The map canvas is part of the gvSIG application interface with standard GIS tools visible, not an image opened in a web browser or image viewer.

integrity.description: The project was saved via the application, not copied via terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: The save action is visible through the gvSIG 'File -> Save As' dialog or interface, rather than a 'cp' command in a terminal window.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target save path is exactly '/home/ga/gvsig_data/projects/sa_regional.gvsproj'. The filter must use the exact string 'South America' for the 'CONTINENT' field. The original layer name is 'ne_110m_admin_0_countries' and it must be filtered in place without creating new layers.
